page.content: In March 2025, Skanska AB's equipment fleet utilization report indicates a total of 180 units in the fleet, comprising 50 Excavators, 30 Bulldozers with a utilization rate of 80% and 1,200 total hours used, 20 Cranes with a utilization rate of 85% and 900 total hours used, 40 Forklifts with a utilization rate of 70% and 1,000 total hours used, 25 Dump Trucks with a utilization rate of 90% and 1,100 total hours used, and 15 Concrete Mixers with a utilization rate of 78% and 750 total hours used.

lines.text: In March 2025, Skanska AB's equipment fleet utilization report indicates a total of 180 units in the fleet, comprising 50
Excavators, 30 Bulldozers with a utilization rate of 80% and 1,200 total hours used, 20 Cranes with a utilization rate of 85%
and 900 total hours used, 40 Forklifts with a utilization rate of 70% and 1,000 total hours used, 25 Dump Trucks with a
utilization rate of 90% and 1,100 total hours used, and 15 Concrete Mixers with a utilization rate of 78% and 750 total hours

page.content: The total fleet hours amount to 5,450, and the average utilization across all equipment stands at 78%. Maintenance costs incurred total $200K, alongside fuel consumption of 15,000L. Furthermore, the company has made 10 new purchases while retiring 5 pieces of equipment.
